hello

# --- Contacts General ---
contact add Alice 0501234567 15.05.1990
contact add Bob 0671234567
contact change Alice Alicia
contact search Ali
contact search

# --- Contact Phones ---
contact phone add Alicia 0931234567
contact phone change Alicia 0501234567 0509876543
contact phone search 0671234567
contact phone delete Alicia 0931234567

# --- Contact Emails ---
contact email add Alicia alicia@example.com
contact email change Alicia alicia@example.com alicia.new@example.com
contact email search alicia
contact email delete Alicia alicia.new@example.com

# --- Contact Birthdays ---
contact birthday set Bob 20.08.1995
contact birthday change Bob 21.08.1995
contact birthday search 7
contact birthday delete Bob

# --- Contact Addresses ---
contact address set Alicia Kyiv, Khreshchatyk 1
contact address change Alicia Kyiv, Khreshchatyk 2
contact address search Kyiv
contact address delete Alicia

# --- Notes ---
note add Buy milk and bread
note add Call the doctor tomorrow
note change 1 Buy milk, bread, and eggs
note search bread
note search

# --- Note Tags ---
note tag add 1 groceries
note tag add 2 urgent
note tag add 2 health
note tag change 2 urgent important
note tag delete 2 health
note tag search groceries
note tag search
note tag sort

# --- Cleanup and Terminate ---
contact delete Bob
note delete 2
all
close
